# J-SET SHOPPING — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A peer-to-peer online marketplace where individuals can post items for sale and purchase goods from other users. The platform focuses on enabling community-driven commerce, similar to a classifieds or second-hand marketplace.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
List items for sale and discover unbeatable local deals on our peer-to-peer marketplace. Skip the mercari selling fee and start your own community-driven shop today!

### How It Works
https://example.com/how-it-works
See how simple peer-to-peer selling can be. From listing your first item to making a sale, our step-by-step guide shows you how to keep more profit with zero mercari selling fee surprises.

### Community & Trust
https://example.com/community-trust
Experience secure community-driven commerce built on real trust. Learn how we protect every transaction so you can buy and sell confidently, leaving risky classifieds behind.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Have questions about listing, buying, or fees? Our support team is ready to help you maximize your earnings and find exactly what you need. Reach out and let&#39;s get selling!

## Products

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About J-SET SHOPPING
A peer-to-peer online marketplace where individuals can post items for sale and purchase goods from other users. The platform focuses on enabling community-driven commerce, similar to a classifieds or second-hand marketplace.

## Services/Products
- product listings
- buying
- selling

## Target Audience
- general public looking to buy and sell items
- General Public Sellers
- Bargain Hunters Buyers
- Sustainability Enthusiasts

## Industry
E-commerce / Marketplace

---

- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
- Products (JSON): https://example.com/products.json
- Products (Google Merchant RSS): https://example.com/product-feed.xml
